## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor/maintenance
- [ ] Breaking change

## Validation

- [ ] Tests added or updated (as needed)
- [ ] Local tests pass
- [ ] Lint/type checks pass (if applicable)

## Security and Risk

- [ ] No known security impact
- [ ] Security impact assessed and documented
- [ ] Rollback plan identified (for risky changes)

## Related Issues

Link issues using: Closes #<issue-number>

## Checklist

- [ ] I followed the contributing guidelines
- [ ] I updated documentation where needed
- [ ] I confirmed no secrets are included
